# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This repository is documentation-first. Security fixes are applied to the default branch.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not open public issues for sensitive vulnerabilities.

Use one of the following options:

- Open a private security advisory on your hosting platform.
- Contact maintainers through your preferred private channel.

When reporting, include:

- Affected files and paths
- Reproduction steps
- Potential impact
- Suggested remediation if known
